inputs.article_title: The Download: Musk v. Altman week 3, and Trump’s tech trading
inputs.article_content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Musk v. Altman week 3: Musk and Altman traded blows over each other’s credibility. Now the jury will pick a side. In the final week of the Musk v. Altman trial,…

output.summary: The Musk v. Altman trial is ongoing, with both sides trading blows over credibility. The jury will soon decide the outcome. The trial is a significant event in the tech world, with implications for the industry.
output.whats_new: The Musk v. Altman trial has reached its final week
